Facultative autism (n): Capable of, but not restricted to autistic behaviors.

'''Sources:'''

[https://youtu.be/2wq9x2QcZN0?t=4671 Eric on Lex Fridman #16]

[https://youtu.be/8LPwyy4scAc?t=4882 Eric on Tim Ferriss]

[[Category:Ericisms]]
[[sn:Facultative Autism]][[Category:Psychology]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
